author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
śuno śuno nityānanda, śuno haridāsa
sarvatra āmāra ājñā karaha prakāśa

prati ghare ghare giyā kara ei bhikṣā
bolo ‘kṛṣṇa’, bhaja kṛṣṇa, kara kṛṣṇa⋅śikṣā

ihā vai ār nā balibā, balāibā
dina⋅avasāne āsi’ āmāre kahibā
kahena prabhura ājñā ḍākiyā ḍākiyā

“bolo ‘kṛṣṇa’, bhaja kṛṣṇa, laha kṛṣṇa nāma
kṛṣṇa mātā, kṛṣṇa pitā, kṛṣṇa dhana⋅prāṇa

tomā sabā lāgiyā kṛṣṇer avatāra
hena kṛṣṇa bhaja, saba chāḍa anācāra”

śuno dvija, jateka pātaka kaili tui
āra jadi nā karis, saba nimu mui

para⋅hiṁsā, ḍākā⋅curi, saba anācāra
chāḍa giyā ihā tumi, nā kariha āra

dharma pathe giyā tumi laha harināma
tabe tumi anyere karibā paritrāṇa

jata saba dasyu cora ḍākiyā āniyā
dharma⋅pathe sabāre looyāo tumi giyā
en_translation:
Listen, listen Lord Nityānanda! Listen, Haridāsa Ṭhākura! Spread My command everywhere.

Go to every single house and beg this of the people: "Chant 'Kṛṣṇa!', worship Lord Kṛṣṇa, and follow His teachings."

Do not speak or cause to be spoken anything else besides this. Come back to Me at the end of the day and tell Me what happened. He speaks the Lord's command, calling out repeatedly:

"Chant 'Kṛṣṇa!', worship Kṛṣṇa, and take the Name of Kṛṣṇa. Lord Kṛṣṇa is your mother, father, wealth, and very life."

"For all of you, Lord Kṛṣṇa's incarnation has come. Worship such a Kṛṣṇa and give up all unrighteous behavior."

Listen, O twice-born! Whatever sins you have committed—if you do not commit them again, I will take all of them away from you.

Give up violence toward others, robbery, and all other unrighteous acts. Do not perform them again.

Follow the path of righteousness and chant the Holy Name of Lord Hari. Then you will also be able to deliver others.

Gather all the robbers and thieves by calling them to you, and lead everyone onto the path of righteousness.
